calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing Re; Petition For Relief Pursuant To Interstate And International Depositions And Discovery Act And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIC W. WITT OF THE CAVANAGH LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (602) 322-4000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. LAUREN A. DEAN OF THE LAW FIRM OF MAGNANIMO AND DEAN, TEL. NO. (818) 305-3450 APPEARING FOR THE THRID PARTY PURQUI.COM BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: APPLICANT PURQUI. COMP Hearing Re; Petition For Relief Pursuant To Interstate And International Depositions And Discovery Act - The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Shapiro as follows: Granted. CCP 2029.600 allows for a party to challenge a subpoena issued by an out of state court when that subpoena is served on a witness in California. PurQi.com is a California entity which does not have any agent for service of process in Arizona, nor is it licensed to business in that state. Therefore, service of the subpoena, even though it was issued by a court of another jurisdiction, must comply with the Code of Civil Procedure. Trivedi failed to comply with the requirements of the subpoena and there is no evidence that plaintiff notified PurQi.com that it had been withdrawn prior to the filing of the motion to quash. PurQi.com is the prevailing party and is entitled to attorney's fees in the amount of $6,00.00 to be paid by all the plaintiffs. The court adds a payment date of December 6, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith ; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/EG
